data.body:
Partial fix applied: Added package.json and package-lock.json to review-gate-allowlist.conf. This unblocks Root Cause #2 (review gate blocks version_bump commit) — the most critical blocker since it has no self-service workaround from within a worktree session.

Root Cause #1 (npm install not run before test gate fails on missing deps): The version_bump phase already runs 'npm install --package-lock-only' to sync lockfile. The deeper issue is that the pre-commit test-gate fires during 'git merge --no-ff' (when new deps from package.json are not yet installed in node_modules). This would require running npm install BEFORE the merge commit in _phase_merge — deferred as a follow-on task given complexity.

Root Cause #3 (no pre-authorization path for version_bump commits): Allowlist fix addresses this — package.json and package-lock.json are now pre-authorized.

RED tests: tests/hooks/test-review-gate-allowlist.sh (test_allowlist_contains_package_json + test_allowlist_contains_package_lock_json). GREEN after fix.
